FSLR.thesis: Nvidia earnings boost First Solar stock
FSLR.exit_case: Nvidia earnings have already been released and boosted Nasdaq, potentially resolving the catalyst.

FSLR.exit_advice: The catalyst was Nvidia's earnings boosting First Solar stock. Since Nvidia's earnings have been released, the catalyst is resolved.
